mapper.select:
SELECT t.task_id, t.parent_task_id, t.task_name, t.task_status, t.task_depth, t.report_frequency, t.create_user_id, t.create_time, cu.nick_name AS createUserNickName, cu.user_name AS createUserName, te.user_id AS executorUserId, COALESCE(sub_task_counts.sub_count, 0) as subTaskCount, COALESCE(sub_task_counts.completed_count, 0) as completedSubTaskCount, tr.last_report_time AS lastReportTime FROM task t INNER JOIN task_executor te ON t.task_id = te.task_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON t.create_user_id = cu.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, MAX(report_time) as last_report_time FROM task_report GROUP BY task_id ) tr ON t.task_id = tr.task_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT parent_task_id, COUNT(*) as sub_count, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_count FROM task GROUP BY parent_task_id ) sub_task_counts ON t.task_id = sub_task_counts.parent_task_id
t.task_status = 2 AND t.report_flag = 1
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task_user tu WHERE tu.task_id = t.task_id AND tu.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
AND te.user_id = #{executorUserId}
AND te.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND tr.last_report_time IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), tr.last_report_time) <= t.report_frequency
AND ( tr.last_report_time IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(NOW(), tr.last_report_time) > t.report_frequency )
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
